title: Narodnoe khozyaistvo SSSR (Народное хозяйство СССР) -- official Soviet statistical yearbooks, selected editions 1932-1989
source_org: TsSU SSSR / Goskomstat SSSR (official Soviet state statistics agency), digitized copies hosted by Internet Archive

files.name: nar_khoz_1932_01_02.pdf
files.notes: 1932 edition issue no. 01-02 of 4 (year published as a serial in parts)

files.name: narodnoe-khoziaistvo-sssr_1956.pdf
files.notes: 1956 edition, 296 pages -- first major post-Stalin statistical handbook (data largely for 1955)

files.name: narodnoe-khoziaistvo-sssr_1989.pdf
files.notes: 1989 edition, 768 pages -- last full pre-collapse yearbook; glasnost-era editions began disclosing previously suppressed series (e.g. more candid defense/mortality data)

time_coverage: editions selected span data years ~1932, 1955, 1964, 1974, 1988 (5 editions across the 1930s-1980s); archive.org also holds many more years (1917, 1922, 1958, 1961, 1963-1989 near-complete run) not downloaded here -- see notes
frequency: annual (irregular in early Soviet period; 1932 issued as a multi-part serial)
units: described within each yearbook (Russian-language, mixed physical/value units, rubles at official Soviet prices)
license_terms: public domain / no known restrictions (pre-1978 Soviet state publications; archive.org hosted scans)
notes: IMPORTANT -- these are OFFICIAL SOVIET STATISTICS (Narodnoe khozyaistvo SSSR, published by the state statistical agency TsSU/Goskomstat), NOT the CIA/Western dollar-cost reconstructions in the 'cia-soviet-economy-assessments' dataset. Per docs/bookkeeping.md neutrality principles, label any figures drawn from these yearbooks clearly as 'official Soviet statistics' when used alongside CIA-derived series, since the two are known to diverge substantially (Soviet planned-price/index-number methodology inflated real growth relative to Western reconstructions -- this is a well-documented, non-partisan measurement issue, not a claim about either source's honesty). All files are original Russian-language scans (no English translation) -- OCR text layer present in some but not verified. archive.org item 'narodnoe-khoziaistvo-sssr_<year>' also offers an '_encrypted.pdf' variant for several years (DRM/restricted-view copy) -- the unencrypted .pdf was downloaded instead in every case. Additional years available on archive.org but not downloaded (time/scope-limited to 3-5 editions per task instructions): 1917, 1922, 1958, 1961, 1963, 1964, 1968-1974, 1977-1988 -- follow-up agent could expand this set using the same archive.org identifier pattern 'narodnoe-khoziaistvo-sssr_<year>'.
